output_text:
namespace prescription.system

type DrugId inherits String
type PatientId inherits String
type Dosage inherits String
type Duration inherits String
type PrescriptionId inherits String

model Drug {
    drugId: DrugId
    name: String
    description: String?
}

model Prescription {
    prescriptionId: PrescriptionId
    patientId: PatientId
    drugId: DrugId
    dosage: Dosage
    duration: Duration
}

model Pharmacy {
    pharmacyId: String
    name: String
    address: String
}

service PrescriptionService {
    operation createPrescription(prescription: Prescription): Prescription
    operation fillPrescription(prescriptionId: PrescriptionId, pharmacy: Pharmacy): Prescription
    operation listPrescriptionsForPatient(patientId: PatientId): Prescription[]
}
